ab: i Asing tu ngadan ni malri.
i Ikay tu ngadan ni nani.
ulra ku iva na ma’inay a sasa, i Udalr tu ngadan, pulu’sa tu ’ami harem.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫kulas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Udalr, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: ingku di i valri na ma’inay mu, sahar mi semenay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: sahar ku pakulima, nu kasede’an mu, mukasa mi saruma’enan mukuwa pakulimaya.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: sahar ku kirekadalram da vekalan na ’aliyan, karuwa mi mukasa semenay di pakulima.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
